==Biography==
===2015 Season===
Lee "'''do it'''" Chan-ho joined the new [[Prime Clan]] in early 2015 as their mid laner. They qualified for [[SBENU Champions Summer 2015]] after going 1-1 in their group against [[Samsung Galaxy]] and [[Xenics]] during [[Champions Summer 2015/Promotion|Champions Summer 2015 Promotion]]. Afterwards, Prime was sponsored by SBENU and renamed themselves to [[SBENU Sonicboom]]. With [[SaSin]] as SBENU's primary mid laner for the season, do it only played in two games during Champions Summer. SBENU placed last in the tournament and were forced to play in the [[LCK/2016 Season/Spring Promotion|LCK 2016 Season Spring Promotion]]. SBENU played [[ESC Ever|Ever]] and managed to win 3-1 to requalify for the LCK; however do it didn't play in these games.

===2016 Season===
In December 2015, do it moved from Korea to North America and joined [[Team Dragon Knights]] as a substitute mid laner while [[Ninja]] was suspended.<ref>[http://www.dailydot.com/esports/team-dragon-knights-do-it/ Team Dragon Knights adds former SBENU mid laner do it as substitute] ''dailydot.com''</ref> After the first two weeks of the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Spring Season|season]], however, he was substituted out and [[Thy]] took over the starting position.
